bug.description: signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch leading to incorrect branch

prompt:
There is a signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch leading to incorrect branch downstream of function nr_ue_ul_scheduler in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_UE/nr_ue_scheduler.c:2552.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
